subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Raise thy head from the bosom of guidance, that thy servitude unto Him may show forth as a resplendent hand. Kindle thou a lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء سر از جیب هدی برآور تا عبودیتش ید بیضاای بنماای شمعی برافروز و
subcodes.subjects: @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement
